verbGlossary.ALLOCATES: {source} contractor dedicates a specified headcount of {target} workers to a project for a defined scope period
verbGlossary.ASSEMBLES: {source} builds elevator cabs, hoistways, or complex assemblies in a controlled shop environment before site delivery
verbGlossary.ASSIGNS: {source} contractor designates specific skilled {target}s to a project scope or work area
verbGlossary.AUDITS: {source}evaluates whether a vendor's safety certifications and coverage meet project requirements
verbGlossary.BATCHES: {source} supplier mixes and delivers ready-mix concrete in specified volumes to the jobsite
verbGlossary.BENCHMARKS: {source} coverage metric compares actual {target} staffing levels against planned or industry-standard norms
verbGlossary.CERTIFIES: {source} validates that a QC inspector holds required certifications for the work being inspected
verbGlossary.COMMISSIONS: Design-builder engages a surveyor to establish control points and verify site conditions before construction
verbGlossary.COMMITS: {source} contractor contractually pledges {target} crew to perform masonry or similar scope on the project
verbGlossary.CREWS: {source}assigns in-house iron{target}s into field crews for structural work
verbGlossary.DELIVERS: {source} transports finished {target}s to the jobsite loading dock or laydown area per the delivery schedule
verbGlossary.DEPLOYS: {source} sends trained personnel to a project site for active field duty on scheduled work activities
verbGlossary.DISPATCHES: {source} routes available {target} workers from its labor pool to a specific project or task on a given day
verbGlossary.DISPATCHES_TO_SITE: {source} rental company sends material-handling {target} to the jobsite per the contractor's call-off request
verbGlossary.DISTRIBUTES: {source} supplier delivers bulk lumber or commodity {target}s across multiple jobsites from a regional yard
verbGlossary.EMPLOYS: {source} maintains {target} workers on its direct payroll for project staffing
verbGlossary.ENGAGES: {source} contracts or activates a specialist {target} for a defined scope of inspection or operational work
verbGlossary.FABRICATES: {source} cuts, welds, and finishes structural steel members in a shop per approved drawings before shipment
verbGlossary.FIELDS: {source}deploys its own concrete {target}s to execute placement and finishing on site
verbGlossary.FURNISHES: {source} provides skilled {target} labor as part of its contractual scope of work on the project
verbGlossary.FURNISHES_ON_CALL: {source} rental company makes hauling trucks available on an as-needed basis per the contractor's daily call-offs
verbGlossary.HIRES_OUT: {source} rental company provides compaction {target} under a rental agreement for site work phases
verbGlossary.INSTALLS_VIA: {source} contractor performs fireproofing installation using its own specialized workforce and application {target}
verbGlossary.INVENTORIES: {source} supplier maintains stock levels of plumbing {target}s and pipe in a regional warehouse for project draw-down
verbGlossary.ISSUES: {source} rental company releases welding rigs and accessories from its fleet to a project under a rental ticket
verbGlossary.LEASES: {source} rental company provides {target}s under a long-term rental agreement including maintenance and rigging support
verbGlossary.MANS: {source} staffs a specialty {target} position such as elevator mechanic or sprinkler fitter from its trained workforce
verbGlossary.MILLS: {source} {target}s and finishes casework components such as countertops and cabinets in a millwork shop
verbGlossary.MOBILIZES: {source} arranges transport, setup, and commissioning of heavy equipment or {target}s to the project site
verbGlossary.PALLETIZES: {source} supplier packs and stages masonry units on pallets for efficient jobsite delivery and {target} placement
verbGlossary.PLACES: {source} rental company positions concrete {target}s or placing booms on site for pour-day operations
verbGlossary.PRE_WIRES: {source} pre-assembles lighting {target} wiring harnesses in a shop to reduce on-site installation time
verbGlossary.PREFABRICATES: {source} builds fire protection {target} spools and assemblies off-site for rapid field installation
verbGlossary.PROVIDES: {source} contractor supplies qualified drywall hangers and finishers to execute interior framing and board scope
verbGlossary.PROVISIONS: {source} secures and stages earthmoving {target} on site to support grading and excavation phases
verbGlossary.QUANTIFIES: {source} count metric tallies the number of {target} firms and their labor force active on a project
verbGlossary.RATES: {source}calculates the frequency or severity rate of recordable injuries for {target} workforce
verbGlossary.RENTS: {source} rental company provides earthmoving {target}s under a short-term rental agreement for site work
verbGlossary.RENTS_OUT: {source} rental company supplies aerial lifts and {target}ing platforms to contractors for elevated work access
verbGlossary.RETAINS: {source} keeps a dedicated safety professional on the project staff for the duration of construction
verbGlossary.SENDS: {source} contractor transports glaziers from its shop or union hall to the project site for curtain wall installation
verbGlossary.SHIPS: {source} supplier arranges freight and delivers roofing {target}s from its distribution center to the jobsite
verbGlossary.SHOP_DRAWS: {source} produces detailed shop drawings and then fabricates HVAC {target}work to those approved dimensions
verbGlossary.SPOOLS: {source} supplier cuts and packages electrical {target} to project-specified lengths for jobsite delivery
verbGlossary.STAFFS: {source} fills carpenter positions on the project from its direct-hire workforce or labor pool
verbGlossary.STAGES: {source} supplier pre-positions site {target}s at a laydown yard or staging area near the project for phased delivery
verbGlossary.STOCKS: {source} supplier maintains {target} inventory in standard sizes and grades for on-demand project delivery
verbGlossary.SUBLETS: {source} contractor parcels out low-voltage cabling scope to a specialized technician workforce within its organization
verbGlossary.SUPPLIES: {source} provides HVAC sheet-metal {target}s as part of its mechanical scope on the project
verbGlossary.SUPPLIES_ON_HIRE: {source} rental company makes piling rigs available for foundation work under a mobilization-plus-daily-rate structure
verbGlossary.TEMPERS: {source} heat-treats and finishes glass panels to specification before shipping to the glazing subcontractor
verbGlossary.TESTS: {target}s testing lab performs compressive strength, slump, or other quality tests on concrete cylinders and samples
verbGlossary.VERIFIES: {source} confirms that installed HVAC {target} meets design intent through functional performance testing
verbGlossary.WAREHOUSES: {source} supplier stores paint and coating {target}s in a climate-controlled facility for phased project delivery
